creator: brian@awfulhak.org
text:
> 
> >Number:         5557
> >Category:       bin
> >Synopsis:       /usr/sbin/ppp no longer works with SecurID cards

This can be achieved by using

  pppctl mysocket set authkey NewPassword

before you dial (and with a more recent version of ppp).  Does this 
work for you ?

-- 
Brian <brian@Awfulhak.org>, <brian@FreeBSD.org>, <brian@OpenBSD.org>
      <http://www.Awfulhak.org>
Don't _EVER_ lose your sense of humour....
